title: Government Transparency and Open Meetings Reform Act
summary: Strengthens the Texas Open Meetings Act and Public Information Act by closing loopholes, increasing penalties for violations, requiring online posting of government spending data, and expanding public access to records.
eastTexasImpact: Would make it easier for East Texas residents to access county and city spending records, monitor local government meetings, and hold officials accountable. Addresses complaints about closed-door decision making in several East Texas jurisdictions.
